name: Qualified Equity Grant Deferral

eligibility.description: Available to non-excluded employees of private corporations with a written plan providing stock rights to at least 80% of full-time U.S. employees.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows qualified employees of private corporations to defer the recognition of income from the exercise of stock options or settlement of RSUs for up to 5 years.
